Ridiculous server latency even with solid internet. So much desync issues completely ruins the beauty of this game. Genuinely a horrible purchase unless they do something about it and quick. Players are dropping like crazy that much is understandable through their queue times. The rank system is horrible, despite being the mvp, you lose the same points as everyone else. You lose the same points if a teammate leaves the game without any reprecussion to them. No reports no nothing just absolutely miserable. I don't care if this is SloClap's first online game, they have thousands of popular online game to take notes and inspiration off of. The game should not have released in this state and were I not playing with a friend I would have immediately refunded this bug infested game. Buy at your own risk.

Edit: its been a year roughly and there has been no changes, the player count is on a steady decline and even with the official fifa world cup airing, rematch shows no signs of getting better. Maybe the real rematch is the friends we made along the way

Can't recommend it as it stands for two reasons:

- netcode is still terrible, leading in desyncs or disconnects
- NO EOMM IN RANKED MATCHES

The second one is the real dealbreaker for me, because it completely disregards your progress up the ladder. It doesn't matter how far you get, the teammates you'll get are purely a luck of the draw. Sometimes you'll get paired up with people much below your rank, or much higher. Same with the opponent team. It makes for an unbalanced experience throughout much of the matches you'll spend in ranked mode, and a really frustrating climb... or fall. Sometimes you'll feel like you do all the work, to no avail. Sometimes you'll feel like you're the weak link in your team. But rarely do you feel any cohesion.

I'll leave the game aside until they decide to implement EOMM.

El único problema de este juego, es que lo juega gente que no sabe jugar al fútbol, todos quieren ser Messi, sin siquiera saber que el fútbol es redondo y hay que pasarlo a los compañeros. Le dije a uno baja a defender y me respondió "Estoy de caza-goles", de caza goles, en ese momento supe que la partida se perdió. Van a tener que agregar una liga más, porque en Diamante son todos muy malos y se necesitan filtros.

Actualización: 115 Horas a la hora de hacerla.

Hoy se publicó el parche #2, se ven mejorías en cuanto a lo que era realmente el problema del juego, la persistencia y consistencia, lo que uno veía, no era lo mismo que veía otro. Hubo algunas mejorías con respecto a eso, aunque los servidores aún son flojos, ya se entiende un poco más el juego.
Lo más importante fue la mejoría en el emparejamiento, ya que ayer tranquilamente me podía tocar un plata, siendo que soy Elite, y ahora juego con gente de Diamante para arriba, lo cual es una amplia diferencia. No dejan de creerse Messi ni de ser malisimos la mayoría, pero bueno, por lo menos saben las mecánicas básicas del juego..

Увидел игру в ютубе у стримера, по виду понравилось, решил купить, и проблемы начались сразу же. Были постоянные потери соединения, из за чего нельзя было играть, проблема решилась установкой gear up, но через две недели игра перестала работать и с ним, потеря соединения со стимом. Пробовал и запретик, читал как можно решить эту проблему, но так и не решил. В общем могу сказать что сервера в игре просто ужасные, даже если у вас получится запустить игру, то пинг будет выше чем в других играх, анимации будут дергаными. 잡기술 쓰려는 개버러지 새끼들 때문에 공 점유도 안되고, 전봇대 새끼들때문에 5대4 해야하고 매칭도 개버러지 시스템이라 랭 돌리는 의미가 없음. 5인큐 잡히면 그냥 뚜드려 맞아야하고, 버그는 진짜 게임에 문제 될 정도인데도 핫픽스조차 안하는 개발진 리스펙함.
랜덤 팀원 패스하는 사람 만나면 존나게 감사해야하고, 기름손 키퍼버그에 공 안잡히는 버그, 기타 등등 그냥 게임 방해 요소 좃대게 많음. 평가 한번 안써본 사람인데 이런 상태의 개좃인디겜을 32,000원이나 주고 산 스스로를 혐오하며 과거의 나에게 칼찌를 놓고 싶음. 어느정도 버그 다 잡히고, 랭크 시스템 개편되고 하면 다시 돌아올 의향은 있지만 본질적으로 '축구'라는 스포츠 자체가 여기엔 적용이 안됨. 무료로 풀리면 하던지 아니면 아주아주 나중에 픽스되면 하세요. 가슴 다 찢고싶고 마우스 사슴벌레 마려움.

O jogo é divertido e tem um bom potencial, mas ainda falta bastante para que ele possa ser considerado pronto. O polimento geral está insuficiente, o matchmaking é praticamente inexistente, e o sistema de pontuação por vitória e derrota é bastante problemático. Além disso, o jogo apresenta muitos travamentos, lags, crashes e bugs que ainda não foram resolvidos. Pelo preço atual, acredito que ainda não vale a pena adquirir.

Depois de quase 200 horas jogadas, acredito que minha análise tenha que mudar, o jogo é muito divertido e original em sua ideia, mesmo tendo muitos problemas e as vezes parecer abandonado pelos desenvolvedores. Eu continuo recomendando, porque o jogo realmente entrega muito bem aquilo a que se propõe.

Não sou de avaliar muito os jogos, mas vamos la...

O jogo não esta 100%, precisa de muito polimento tanto gráfico (texturas e customizações estão bugadas com muita frequência), bugs de contato do jogador com a bola, bugs, bugs e bugs que vão de a bola passar por dentro de você em uma jogada de defesa até um cabelo de 30 reais (vou falar de monetização ainda kkk)... Mas eu acredito que em alguns meses o jogo irá sim chegar em um estágio mais ideal (nesse primeiro mês ja foi adicionado o sistema de mute nos lobbys (você pode acessar ele pelo menu do jogo, embora não testei ele ainda ksksks) e acredito que nos próximos meses serão corrigidos os bugs e adicionados os sistemas principais que faltam. (PELO AMOR DE DEUS, DEVOLVAM O PASSE COM WASD E ADICIONEM O SISTEMA DE AJUSTE DE SENSIBILIDADE DO PASSE)

Agora vamos a mam##$ão de r@la ksks, o jogo é viciante, divertido e justo (ao meu ver), a proposta é interessante e diferente. Eu pessoalmente estou apaixonado no jogo desde o lançamento e acredito que tem o potencial para ser o "novo rocket league".

Monetização é uma questão "delicada" hoje em dia, mas acho que um jogo custar R$ 89,00 (lembrando que nossa moeda não vale nada, isso é algo como $15~16 a depender do dia) e dos poucos itens cosméticos que o jogo lançou até o momento, o mais caro custa R$ 30 (cerca de $ 5) e ainda temos o passe de batalha que vem junto das edições Pro em diante e que SE PAGA, algo raro hoje em dia... O pessoal que esta criticando o preço do jogo e a monetização me parece estar reclamando por costume mesmo, pois geralmente as empresas estão sendo cada vez mais mercenárias, mas a Sloclap localizou os preços da moeda e do jogo perfeitamente no meu ver.

*Mais de 100 horas de jogo no game final e 30~40hrs nos betas 1 e 2

Resumidamente:

Nota do jogo no estado atual: 6/10
Potencial do jogo para o futuro: 10/10

I've spent over 100 hours in this game, and somehow it feels worse after every patch. The matchmaking constantly pairs you with teammates that just don’t fit, and even months after release, there's still no proper way to report individual players.

They advertised crossplay, only to delay it without clear communication. The whole game feels like it’s still in beta.

Gameplay is incredibly unbalanced. Sometimes all you have to do is spam one button and no one can take the ball from you. Defending feels terrible, and playing as a goalkeeper is either ridiculously overpowered—sucking in everything within a 5-meter radius—or completely broken, with the ball glitching right through you.

But hey, at least there are new cosmetic items every week... most of which you can only buy with real money.

Claramente es un producto sin terminar, viendo la cantidad de errores que en grupos con amigos pueden llegar a ser graciosos pero que no deberían estar, dado que este ya a sido su lanzamiento completo. se aprecia que traten de arreglarlo por medio de hotfix y actualizaciones pero el problema principal sigue y seguirá siendo los pobres servidores que hacen la mayor parte de casos una experiencia frustrante.

Pequeño inciso, falta variedad de cabellos, sacan puros peinados feos que limitan la personalización de los personajes. la tienda se buggea constantemente y la personalización de colores en gorros y guantes suele buggearse también obligándote a reiniciar el juego varias veces.

This game represents everything wrong with the game industry right now. Make a "Minimum  Viable Product" you know will get a decent playerbase by pulling from the prestige of the studio (Sifu, Absolver), put a 25$ pricetag on it and then fill the game with micro-transactions, ♥♥♥♥♥♥ deluxe editions and abusive battle passes to cover the costs and make profit quick given the "little" investment you put to make this "Vertical Slice" of a game. Playing is fun but it pains me to know I bought a game that is lacking by design, the objective isn't to make the best version of the game the devs can make, it is to make a minimum viable product and it shows.

TLDR; 
DON'T BUY THE GAME unless you are 5 stack. Don't hope that everything will be fine after sometime. Please read above :)

The game is too janky in its current state. It definitely needs a lot more work before it becomes worth to play. Because it relies so heavily on ball possession detection, that system should be the most fleshed out, highest priority system in this game. Yet it feels like someone on the team spent a Friday afternoon implementing that system quickly before leaving for the weekend.  

It just barely ever feels like you're actually in possession of the ball, and if you're just a few centimeters off, the player will completely ignore an incoming ball. Unless you're trying to chain a incoming pass into a shot, then the game will naturally make sure you and the ball are magically linked. But if your goalkeep passes you the ball and you do not align perfectly, that ball will roll past your legs.  

The worst mechanic has to be dribbling tho. It's a essential mechanic in football but what's the point if you can dribble the ball away from the enemy but he just slides past where the ball was 5 minutes ago and boom you're falling on your butt, ball already en route to your goal. That is, if the game decided that you were in possession of the ball. If you weren't, you're just going to walk away from the ball (and this one's a coin-flip).  

This game can absolutely be as much fun, if not more, than Rocket League. But it will take a lot of hard work (that I'm not seeing yet) to get there.

REMATCH is exactly what I want in a game in a sports gameplay loop. It's got solid controls, a simple button scheme but high learning curve strategically, and quick matches that allow you to knock out one after another. 

You first pick the game up and everything is overwhelming, the controls feel a little hard to keep track of, but then you start to get the flow after a couple days and you're able to place the ball where you want it. As a someone who played soccer until high school, it brings you right into the mindset of being on the field trying to make the best play.

The issues with the game lie outside of this.

Network issues impacting priority on such a large scale is a massive issue to the game. So many times where I am playing keeper and I jump for a ball, get the animation, sound, and even points as if I caught the ball, only for the ball to teleport to an attacking players feet.  It happens all over the field with ghost tackles or shots that get body blocked meters away from the one blocking it.

There also needs to be more added for a "finished" product:

- Clubs is a big one as this game is inherently competitive, even at low level play, so a club system where you can search, request to apply for clubs, find new people to play with that fit your playstyle would allow for a much better game experience overall.

- A REAL ranked system where you only match with people in your rank or barely outside of it WITH demotions. I will say, I have felt a jump of difficulty when getting promoted to Platinum, but I am often playing with and against mixture teams ranking from Silver all the way to Master. If I am a Platinum, place me with anyone from division 1 Gold to division 3 Diamond, make the queues longer if needed. The excessive mixture of ranks leaves ambiguity about if I am actually progression, or I am just getting a good run of teams.

- More ranked queues. 3v3, 4v4, and solo 5v5. I know the game is trying to push 5v5 as a premiere mode, but each mode requires different skillsets to be as effective and a lot of players prefer those modes.

- Report system. There's people going AFK for various reasons. that's getting old. There's also lots of people, especially in ranked, scoring 2 own goals to forfeit a match with 3-4+ minutes remaining. Which leads me to the next point:

- Add a Forfeit in Ranked, especially when you someone leaves or gets disconnected. Down 0-3 with 20-30 seconds remaining against a stonewall defense people often just own goal anyways. It's also good if you get shorthanded right off the start of a match as sometimes people don't load in, leaving you 1-2 people down.

BESIDES all of these suggestions, I still have a lot of fun playing this game and genuinely strive to get better, similar to 2015 when I first picked up Rocket League and felt the my sports background and my love for video games collide in a way that regular sports games could provide. Yes you could say this game resembles FIFA Street or Pro Clubs, but SloClap's version of 5v5 soccer in my opinion is the best so far and captures exactly what a sports fan wants in a game like this. If it can keep up with player demand and make changes to polish what they have into a product will continue to love, it could replicate or even surpass the success of Rocket League I 100% believe.

If you've been looking to buy this game, read this first, you need to know what you're getting into.

This game had serious potential, and it could still reach it, but it was released far, far too early. 
The developers appear to be in over their heads at this point, not showing any urgency either. 
There is a reason they are steadily losing players, and a reason the recent reviews are "mixed"


Here is what's been happening with the game so far.

At first, during the beta, things were decent. Flaws were obvious, but we all expected that, and figured that they'd be fixed by the time the game came out, and they most certainly did fix a lot of them,

But there are still things they seem to have very big issues of fixing, the netcode being the biggest one.
This game is supposed to be skill based, but I've lost count of the amount of times I come across things that simply shouldn't happpen. I'll make a tackle, clearly hit the ball, I'll even have the ball at my feet for a half a second or a full one, running with it, then suddenly realize that no, I actually didn't hit the player at all, and hes now on his way towards my teams goal.

This isn't something that happens every game, but it happens a lot more than what feels acceptable. And no, it is not our internet, as much as the developers would like to say it is. I'm on a wired, 1000 up, 1000 down 1gig connection, my ping is at 19-30 when I play.

Another glaring issue, is the vast amount of exploits / bugs, whatever you wanna cal them. I'm not gonna tell you all their names and what they do, but there are several exploits that you will see every match, that quite literally defy physics, and even includes straight up teleportation of the ball. It is ridiculous, and it has been in the game since release.

The developers recently did update the game, and while at first, the majority of players were quick to celebrate it as a great one, it just as quickly became obvious that it wasn't. The exploits are still in the game for one, and now balls will be passed to you, and simply go through you. You can be standing still and receive a pass, and it's like you have no hitbox. This doesn't happen every time of course, but it happens often, and it kills the experience of the game.

This is even more frustrating when you're playing as a goalkeeper. I think everyone with 20-30 hours+ in this game, has seen at least 20 or more instances of a shot coming at you, you dive directly at its path, you see your character catch it, only for the ball to go into the net. Again, this is NOT due to your connection. Sure, if your connection is bad, or you're playing with friends from another continent, you can expect stuff like that, but if you're sitting on a sub 50 ping, these things are unacceptable.


Cross-play has been something people wanted way before the game was released, but the devs remained quiet on the matter, for whatever reason. They recently ( towards the end of July ) addressed it, and said it would 6-9 weeks before they could add it, that is a LONG time for a game that is bleeding players at this rate. But then again, maybe only PC players want it, because we have a cheating problem in this game, and while it's not severe, it's definitely becoming more frequent at this point. 

I know of 1 cheater, who I've met over and over since the start of the game, who is still cheating and playing as of July 29th, well over a month since the game was released. I met him as a recently as last night.
The reason why hes still cheating? If you want to report a player......you have to have a discord account, you have to join their server, you need to provide proof directly to the Devs themselves. This is absolutely laughable and pathetic for a game in 2025 to not have an actual report feature, complete joke.


The gameplay itself, when it works, is solid and honestly really enjoyable. 
However, when you start actually getting good at the game, and reach the higher ranks, you will start to notice that everything is based on exploiting the priority system to the fullest. You're not playing football at these levels, you are not trying to build up an attack by opening passing lanes with runs and dribbles or trying to tiki taka your team to a goal, or even defend as a unit, because it's almost pointless. The meta is spamming balls in front of the goal, and doing overhead kicks while using Extra Effort, and that's it. You'll quickly start dreading playing the game, because every match is now the same, it's all trying to set up the easiest way to score a goal, because if you don't, your opponent will. 

So in short:
-Netcode needs to be fixed, now.
-Priority system needs to be the 2nd thing they have to fix
-Cheating / ACTUAL report features
-Cross-play

If the devs do fix all these issues, most the game is absolutely worth the price, but as of right now, it's worth maybe 10 dollars and you'd have to go into it with very low expectations and know you'll be playing a janky game.

このゲームは、正直初心者に優しくありません。ある程度実力を身に着けないとランクマッチなど行くと強制５ｖ５となりますので実力がないといけません。そして負け始めたり初心者のようなプレイをするとトロールなどされてしまいます。僕はランク一戦目でトロールに会いました。正直ランクでも３ｖ３や４ｖ４などのランクも欲しいですし正直実力を身に着けるまでカジュアルにこもってずっとやってそれからランク行くことをおすすめします。
そしてほかにも入力に遅延があったり挙動不審なところも見られますため、難しいです。
そして良いところは、友達と一緒にやるととても楽しいゲームかつエンジョイできるゲームということです。
ほかにも自分がドリブルで相手を抜き去りゴールを決めた時などは、とても気持ちの良いものとなっています。
今回はマイナスの面だけを書いたためあれですが、このような点を含めてご購入を検討してみてはどうでしょうか？
Currently Good.

NÃO COMPREM ESSE JOGO AINDA

MUITO BUGADO, você presencia INÚMERAS interações bugadas durante uma partida, o sistema de prioridade é pífio (é ainda mais podre quando falamos da prioridade quando o jogador esta no "extra effort"), mecânicas completamente ridículas e praticamente sem nenhuma counter play como o "ippy slide" ou "blade shot". O goleiro eu não quero nem comentar de tão bizonho, voleio extremamente quebrado que juntamente com o sistema ruim de prioridade resulta em um meta SUPER maçante.
O passe jogando com mouse e teclado é DESNECESSARIAMENTE HORRÍVEL, SUPER sensível, o minimo movimento a mais no mouse faz seu passe ir pra casa do *******.
Servidor tenebroso. Com certa frequência eu e meus amigos caímos da partida, simplesmente somos desconectados e isso atrapalha muito, principalmente quando são dois caindo de uma vez.
É TANTA bizarrice e bugs que daria pra fazer um texto extenso.
Mas beleza, poderíamos relevar um pouco o fato de terem lançado o jogo completamente cru se recebêssemos atualizações com frequência, mas são muito demoradas, quando chegam não resolvem completamente os problemas, muito focadas em resolver bugs mais "tranquilos" (por exemplo o replay bugado, que não impacta diretamente na gameplay) enquanto as questões na parte de gameplay e configurações para o mouse e teclado que é o pior e deveria ser prioridade vão sendo deixadas pra depois.
Mas as skins, roupas e acessórios sempre estão em dia e saindo com muita frequência.

Como comentei antes, tem muita coisa a ser dita sobre esse jogo e ficaria uma analise muito longa.
Resumindo, não vale nem um pouco no momento, é uma ideia ótima executada de forma pobre.

This game gets a lot of ♥♥♥♥ for not being perfect, and perhaps rightfully so, but considering it has completely reinvented the sports genre in a way that scratches an itch that I thought only FPS games could, I can't help but still praise it. A buddy convinced me to buy it, and I was expecting to refund before my 2 hour limit, but here I am a couple months later having sunk 200 hours into it.

There are no skill ratings (accuracy, handling, stamina, etc.)... just you and a character with the exact same capabilities as everyone else. The only thing that makes a difference in your gameplay is experience and skill (and maybe a glitch sometime tbh). 

Matchmaking can be frustrating when you get to Plat and realize how many people got carried and have no idea how to play the game, but overall, I've never had this much fun with any sports game before. Highly recommend sticking with the devs as they communicate well and continue to update the game. In a year this will be a charm.

[h1]Love the game, and this comes from a guy that has no interest whatsoever to real football.[/h1]
[b]But it needs tons to improve upon[/b]. Things like :
- Network Quality ( I've gotten alot of matches where the packet loss is extremely high and disconnection is frequent )
- Visual & Audio Bugs ( ball isn't visible on dribbling, and sounds got doubled )
- Balancing issue ( Some game mechanics are straight up abusable to the point they can't be countered )
- Rank System ( I got into a match against an elite team on gold rank, that's outrageous )
- QoL Features ( like the ability to practice with teammates before a match )
and so on....
Please don't ignore these issues and put all of your efforts only on the cosmetic aspects, devs...
[b]Game's too awesome to become an abandonware.[/b]

After all the hype and excitement it's not really very enjoyable to play.

Наиграв 100 часов, наконец можно сделать конкретные выводы по игре.
Сама концепция и идея игры просто потрясающие, это буквально новый вдох в онлайн-игры и уж тем более в мир футбольных симуляторов. Если играть в пати с друзьями, то можно получить реальное удовольствие и жесткое кайфануть. НО:
1. абсолютно ужасные сервера, отвратительное соединение и все, что связанно с коннектом, пингом и регистрацией. 
2. почти полное отсутствие возможности играть в соло или в дуо, так как нет никакой системы наказания. Хочешь руинить? - велком, хочешь забивать в свои ворота? - пожалуйста, хочешь нажимать С 6 минут без перерыва? - рады тебя видеть! Не дали пас или прожали "Good job" после твоей ошибки - просто ливаешь, ждешь несколько минут и регаешь новую.
3. Отсутствие адекватной ранкед системы. Почему нельзя падать в дивизионы ниже? Почему мне на одном и том же ранге попадаются челы, которые играют 10 игру и челы, которые метят в кибеспортсмены?

Каков итог - если бы у Rematcha была крутая команда разработчиков, из этой игры можно было бы сделать конфетку, бомбу и игру на многие годы вперед. Но у Rematcha этой команды нет, как нет и балансных патчей, попыток в адекватные сервера или вообще в какие-то положительные изменения. Когда разработчик за месяц добавляет несколько шапок, скинчик и одну обновленную анимацию удара с лета - это провал.
В целом игру я рекомендую как реально что-то новое и крутое. Но еще сильнее рекомендую подождать полгодика и посмотреть, исправится ли что-то. Если все будет идти таким чередом, как сейчас, REMATCH ожидает судьба таких игр как Artifact или Deadlock.

It's a fun game at it's core. Just don't take it too seriously or get too sweaty and you'll enjoy it.

However, it feels like an early access game.

I hold the same sentiment as other reviews: Rematch has the bones of a great game but not the grace. Once it has some more time in the oven, it could really be a satisfying experience, but general "game feel" needs improvement due to physics quirks and lag.

Rematch also still doesn't have an in-game report system, which is criminal. And the ranking system is apparently just totally random matches. As a bronze you can go up against a grandmaster. And no matter your personal performance, you still get the same amount of rank as anyone else. It literally boils down to random chance, i.e. "how much time did you put into ranked", as opposed to "how good are you". These seriously prevent the game from being taken seriously.

I think it's still worth the asking price, and I hold out hope that the devs will stick with it long enough to see the issues through. Here's hoping players stick around that long too, though...

This game does not deserve to be review bombed,

People have forgotten what reviews are meant for,

they are meant as a tool to give potential new players a nuanced take on games,

In this game you can get extremely deep into dribbling mechanics: Ippi slides, dash slides, advanced passes walling, feint shotting, long shotting, if your team is not insane you can carry to a certain degree as long as they pass occasionally.  

This is a game that can pander to a casual and competitive audience at the same time and this cant be said about many games   

If you are a new player make sure to play prologue and tutorials as the controls are slightly unorthodox and PASS THE BALL the only type of player I want to see dribbling on my team is someone who has godly mechanics, otherwise please don't passing will help you rank up more than any other move in the game.

Also make sure to queue 5 stack (if you have a decent player on your team, add them its even better if they have a position they main

Now as for "Gamebreaking bugs" there aren't any that will make you hard lose games, we had someone attempt the goalie line over the head kick that is apparently "busted" we won the game easily,

I have played against speed hackers (we won)

Now i agree that the game isn't perfect as it currently stands and definitely has room for improvement however you need to remember sloclap is not EA, a reviewbomb will not make them want to change things for the better and they do a lot more harm than good.

The game needs to improve netcode, priorities and ranked matchmaking however apart from that everything works pretty smooth, however if sloclap do not listen to community feedback the game is going to end up like absolver

And I dont want that to happen

EDIT:23/09/2025:

I cannot recommend the game in its current state and coming back on after this update angered me immensely it really does seem like the game is going backwards:

-Movement has been gutted and quick direction changes with EE are no longer feasible, tapping the ball a slight bit diagonally means potentially losing it if you dont path perfectly to the ball and with how janky movement has become all of a sudden this happens often

-Some passes you just wont receive despite them being on you and you standing right in the balls path

-You used to be able to buffer shots or passes and this was a good mechanic allowing you to charge up power properly and it gave space for a LOT of skill expression (new lag means you cannot do this anymore or it has been removed im not sure)

-Tackles feel RNG and input delay means you will often pull slide tackles instead of standing ones

-3v3 ranked should have been a feature in season 0 and it being touted as an asset for this new season is laughable

-90% the cosmetics are ass i mean bro come on, no item has real flair to it

Sloclap have received a fat stack of cash with this game what the fk are they doing with it I don't want this game to die but this update ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ stinks I can't lie it just seems like extreme laziness.

 Devs please pull your fingers out and do something and I'll change this review

The game is a lot of fun when it works!
The updates are very slow and a lot basic functionality is missing in a paid online-only game. The server issues haven't really improved since launch and the latency has gotten even worse for after the latest update. Ranked mode is very bare bones: 
-no penalty for leaving the match
-get ranked down if you lose while some people on your team have left
-very limited communication system. The 4 quick commands can't always communicate to your teammates your intentions. It seems very few people are using voice chat

And the other issues have been listed in other reviews here. 
I'd still say you should buy the game if you have a squad of friends to play with. Otherwise it might be very frustrating.

This game is mechanically a ton of fun, but it is not worth the price.

There are gamebreaking bugs in just about every other match. I have lost so many games due to netcode issues, players not being able to interact with the ball, desync, etc.

There is no penalty for players who throw games or ragequit early. The game will keep going even if an entire team disconnects from the game. If all of your teammates disconnect from the match, the game will play out, and you will lose the same amount of rp as if it was a evenly matched 5v5. There is a massive problem of players scoring on their own team to end games quicker because they get upset with their teammates.

As far as I can tell, there is no skill-based matchmaking in competitive. You can be paired with anyone from the lowest rank to the highest rank regardless of your current skill level.

Competitive is also exclusive 5v5s for no discernible reason

The recent updates have completely broken my settings customization, all changes have been reset to default and I can no longer change them. My microphone and team chat are always toggled on with no option to mute. All game audio besides voice chat has stopped working despite having only one audio output for my computer.

There is still no in-game report feature for people who are trolling or offensive in chat. The developers just redirect you to the default steam report system that does absolutely nothing.

High level competitive ranked gameplay just consists of cherry pickers sitting the box waiting for a lob pass and glitchy priority to score

As an avid player of early access games, this should still be in early access in its current state. Fix your game and release crossplay so I can finally play with friends Sloclap.

First of all, you can’t report players. That means griefers can do whatever they want without consequences, and players can leave matches without facing any penalties. On top of that, you can actually lose rank, but not in the way you’d expect — you can only drop divisions within a tier, which doesn’t really matter in the long run.

The servers had a huge problem before, which thankfully got fixed, but bugs are still common and noticeable. I genuinely love the game, but it feels like there are so many simple issues that still haven’t been addressed.

On top of that, it’s starting to feel like the developers are focusing more on monetization than fixing the core problems — releasing low-effort skins and overpriced bundles instead of prioritizing stability and gameplay.

Overall, I really believe in this game, but it needs more polish and attention to player experience. Please fix it. Thanks.

This is a great game and I really want to love it. I have been playing rocket league for years and the chance to play a soccer game in that format is epic for me. However, this game is currently being held back by the mechanics and the net code. I won't harp on net code for two reasons. One, its net code it can be "easily" patched and two a lot of online games have net code issues at first. Rocket League had its own set of net code issues back in the day. The mechanics are what really get to  me. When on defence it honestly feels like you can never truly defend the ball. All of the tackles have insane range and your defensive manoeuvres never get the ball far enough out of the way. But my biggest issues come as the keeper. I play keeper a lot, its also where I play soccer IRL. The keeper will randomly drop the ball in the box, which if you have played you would know its a free goal since every dork on the field wants to crowd the keeper. Its a handful of small mechanics that are killing the experience. Like not having a dedicated control to soft field the ball or to even reach out for the ball without punting it to the next guy over. 

I'm not slamming this game. It a wonderful game and I want to see it rise to the fame of Rocket League. I would love to see tournaments and events of Rematch. It has potential to be a long lasting game, but there are a few tweaks that need to be made before it is at that point. My advice, wait for a couple mechanical patches and see where it goes from there.

ゲーム性自体はとても面白いゲームです。

サッカーゲームとして成長を感じられる操作性、味方との連携の重要さなどが分かるゲームとしてとてもいいものだと思います。本当に面白いです！

しかしおすすめできない部分として、一つ目にラグや位置ズレ、プレイヤーが落ちた時の人数不利など理不尽な試合にそれなりに遭遇します。

次に、現在のランクマッチでは、低ランクソロと最高ランクフルPTがマッチングします。かなり厳しいです。

さらに仕方ない部分、当たり前の事ではありますがソロでの野良プレイはとても厳しいものがあります。

味方に永遠と敵の陣地にいる人、ミニマップや視点を動かさず見ていないのか敵をマークしない、パスをしないでボールを保持し続けて取られる、敵に4人全員で攻め込んでカウンターされGK時に1VS3になる、などかなり厳しい状況が多くあります。

そういう人が多いので、自分も下手ではありますがパス回しで敵の揺さぶりやDFとして陣地を守る動き、味方へのカバーの位置取り、ホイールクリックによる声掛けなど、基本的には点取る事以外のプレイの部分などで味方を補助を頑張ることにしました。

しかし、そういう動きをしても味方は敵を揺さぶったり、フェイントをして攻撃せずにGKのミス狙いでただただ撃つことが多く報われることはあまりありません。

GKで守り続けて16分延長してカウンターで負けたときは辛すぎましたｗ

もちろん、それだけでなくちゃんとDFをしてくれる人や、位置取りを考えてくれる人は多くいますし、なんとなく雰囲気のいいチームになったときはすごいやりやすかったりと野良でのプレイは悪いことだけはないです。

ただ、操作が難しいゲームですし、仕方ない場面が多いのは私も本当によくミスをしたりするので気持ちがわかるのでどんまいどんまいといった感じで私はやるのですが、時たま遭遇する味方が負け始めるとオウンゴールし始めたり、声掛けで煽りのような事をしてきます、辛い。

ですので、今の環境で安定して勝ちたい、ランクを勝ち上がりたいならフレンド必須に近いと思います。

後気になったのは期間が長いとはいえ、バトルパスの報酬をすべて取るのがかなりきつい印象を受けた事かな。

総評のようなものとしてはゲームとしての動きが成熟してきたらいいゲームにはなると思いますし、勝ち負けを別とするのならば（勝つのを目指すのは当たり前ですが）楽しむことは全然できるくらい楽しいゲームではあります。

なのでおすすめしたいくらい面白いゲームですが、ソロで始める場合やラグなどの環境面を鑑みると現在の所はぎりぎりおすすめしにくいゲームかなと思います。

ただ、まだシーズン0なので、ゲームの状況が変わったりしたらレビューを変えるかもしれません。

Nie sądziłem, że to napiszę, ale... w REMATCH granie bramkarzem to absolutna petarda. Serio. Przesiedziałem kilka wieczorów z tą grą i chociaż na początku plan był prosty – „pyknę sobie parę meczów” – to skończyło się tak, że nie mogę się oderwać od klatki.

Gra daje totalnie inną perspektywę, kiedy wchodzisz między słupki. Żadnego „klik klik i obrona”, tylko czysta adrenalina, skupienie i momenty, w których czujesz się jak bohater filmu sportowego. Wjeżdża rzut karny? Serducho bije jak szalone, a jak złapiesz piłkę, to masz ochotę zerwać się z krzesła i zrobić ten klasyczny „pięść w powietrze”.

Fizyka piłki jest zrobiona super – nie czujesz, że wszystko dzieje się na szynach. Trzeba naprawdę ogarniać pozycjonowanie, kiedy rzucić się na piłkę, kiedy przyblokować, kiedy się cofnąć. I nie ma tu miejsca na bezmyślne klikanie – bramkarz w REMATCH to prawdziwa rola z odpowiedzialnością, ale też z masą satysfakcji.

Po dobrej interwencji słyszysz te reakcje widowni, widać, jak twoja drużyna się nakręca – no kurde, to działa. Masz wpływ na wynik, a nie siedzisz jak kołek i czekasz, aż coś poleci w twoją stronę. Czuć, że ktoś tu naprawdę pomyślał o tym, żeby pozycja golkipera nie była tylko dodatkiem, ale pełnoprawnym doświadczeniem gameplayowym.

Jeśli ktoś lubi klimaty rywalizacji, emocje jak na Mundialu i chce poczuć się jak Neuer albo Buffon w prime’ie – bierzcie REMATCH i siadajcie na bramkę. To nie jest tylko gra, to sportowy hype simulator.

10/10 za emocje, 11/10 za to, że przez chwilę naprawdę uwierzyłem, że mógłbym być bramkarzem.

Interessantes Game

Ranked
+Ranked Modus mit Suchtpotenzial. Jede Runde ist anders und muss anders gespielt werden.
-Immer -16 oder +20 je nachdem ob man gewinnt oder verliert. Eigene Beteiligung wird nicht gewertet was weird ist. Wieso bekomme ich +20 wenn ich die einzigen Tore geschossen habe und mein mate bekommt auch +20 obwohl er am Anfang der Runde geleaved ist nur um dann zurück zu kommen kurz bevor Schluss ist.

Character
+Character creation ist relativ simpel aber gut gestaltet. -> mehr Auswahlmöglichkeiten wären nice
-Zu wenig Auswahl bzw. vieles sieht gleich aus.

Gameplay an sich
+Schüsse fühlen sich gut an -> viel Spielraum und Optionen
+Torwart zu sein ist recht selbsterklärend aber fühlt sich belohnend an. (Es sei denn es fällt 5 min lang kein Tor und du vergammelst alleine auf deiner hälfte)
-Passen fühlt sich unbalanced an. Oft kannst du einen Schuss zum passen benutzen (was eigentlich nicht so sein soll) um den Pass einfacher durchzubekommen. Schüsse sind genauer und oft kann man mit ihnen Gegner umgehen.

Mates/Community

+Sehr einfache und simple Kommunikation 
-Zu wenig "Sprüche" bzw Anweisungen vor allem als Torwart
+Community ist meistens wholesome und man wird gefühlt als Gott gefeiert sollte man in der letzten Sekunde das Ausgleichtor schießen
+toxischer Spam mit ironisch gemeinten "dankes" oder "gut gespielt" wird verhindert (zumindestens so halb)

Shop
-Ist noch sehr wenig -> gern an Rocket League orientieren also Torexplosionen etc

not huge on football/soccer, especially games having to do with it. but there's something very satisfying in the learning curve here. the games are short 5 minute exhibitions that can run a bit long depending on overtime, but it never feels like so long a commitment you're locked in like other competitive type games. little tricks and finesse feels good when you can actually pull it off, plus getting a good bunch of randoms that aren't ball hogs and actually want to get a win with teamwork and selfless passing is very satisfying. it does happen, but there will be moments you'll get hit with the jerk that spams " GOOD JOB !! " as if they've never made a single mistake. typical rocket league community slipping through the cracks.

the customization is fun ( if you aren't into making a bald slender man or something nigh offensive. ) color pallettes are neat, the battle pass isn't so invasive you FEEL like you need to get it or anything. just cool cosmetics, even on the free track.

the biggest issues i have are ball collision and netcode. sometimes as the goalkeeper you feel like you should have priority grabbing the ball from someone in the box and things just kinda wonk out. it is what it is, i'm sure it'll get fixed in the future.

game good. price point is a bit of a commitment but if it gets any cheaper, and gets crossplay, this really could go places i think.

Симулятор Ванги.
Ты ведешь мяч, соперник от тебя в 10 метрах, угадаешь, какую кнопку он нажмет, чтобы забрать мяч? Ответ простой - не угадаешь. Ты даже не узнаешь когда именно у тебя забрали мяч, по тому что в какой то момент он просто окажется у противника под ногой и это при том, что он до тебя еще не добежал :)
Про вратарей я вообще молчу. Вратарь может бежать на тебя, в 10 метрах от ворот, но когда ты ударишь в пустое место, вратарь заспавнется там с мячом в руках.
Мое любимое - это когда тебе посылают мяч через все поле, рядом нет никого и ты уже готов забивать в одно качание, уже замахнулся, уже услышал звук удара и бум, а мяч отбил соперник в стону твоих ворот. А на миникарте ты увидишь рандомную точку, которая заспавнилась прямо возле тебя.
И даже обновление, где разрабы уверяли что все пофиксили - не помогло. Ничего не изменилось.
Отдельное спасибо за максимально кривые пасы, которые больше похожи на лотерею. Когда ты отдаешь пас впереди идущему игроку, а мяч летит назад или в бок, где стоят соперники.
Рейтинг - это нечто.
Ты будешь 5 минут смотреть, как твои соперники играют в одно касание, бьют по воротам и адекватно распределены по полю, в то время как твои 4 дауна, будут бегать за мячом всей толпой, забивать в свои ворота, ливать посреди матча, спамить в чат, не давать пасы, не будут ловить мячи на воротах и т.д.
Играть в это сейчас попросту невозможно.

Détails


Niveau prise en main, jouabilité et graphisme, on est pas loin de la perfection pour un jeu de foot qui se veut relativement réaliste tout en étant fun et accessible. Les mécaniques de bases sont à la fois simples à appréhender avec quelques heures de jeu, mais les plus motivé·e·s pourront également performer en perfectionnant des techniques qui feront la différence une fois maîtrisées.


Le jeu est assez simple mais son prix reste mesuré, et avec des partenaires de qualité on passera de très bons moments qui rappelleront forcément l’ambiance des foots sur les petits terrains de foot à 5. Bien que secondaires, les possibilités offertes de personnalisation de stade, de célébrations et surtout de skins, font partie des détails appréciables de Rematch.


L’expérience de jeu peut être gâchée par des partenaires stupides et égoïstes en ligne, mais difficile de blâmer le studio pour cela. Il est donc plus sympa de jouer avec des personnes que l’on connait au préalable, ou de se faire des connaissances sympathiques via le jeu afin de privilégier les aspects les plus funs du jeu en réseau.


Enfin, à ce stade du jeu, on peut probablement lui reprocher son manque de fonctionnalités dans le mode classé, qu’il s’agisse de variantes au mode 5v5, qui est cependant excellent, et de quelques ajouts pour améliorer la compréhension du matchmaking en faisant figurer les divisions d’appartenance des partenaires et des adversaires. Mais le jeu n’en est qu’à ses premières semaines et j’espère que les différentes mises à jour contribueront à le rendre de plus en plus agréable pour étendre un maximum sa durée de vie.


8.5/10


[État d'avancement : 46h de jeu ; 92% des succès Steam].

The idea for this game is amazing. Libero Grande for the modern age and with multiplayer. Functionally however its a complete mess and at this moment I cannot recommend it for the following reasons:
[list][*]Bugs and lag including crashes upon scoring and saving create a bad experience when every team mate is crucial.
[*]Broken and lacking mechanics. By broken I mean anything volley related so much so missiling from kick off is super powerful, its boring and makes defending not fun. Lack of dribbling mechanics means we now get broken dribbles where the ball warps through people without much counter play to then > cross > volley > high priority is just not it. It's becoming stale fast.
[*]Community on the whole is generally terrible filled with people that haven't grown beyond playing football as a 12 year old where they can only run forward and never pass. Couple that with the inability to REPORT or BLOCK people makes the experience absolute crap. No I don't want to hear sarcastic "Good jobs" on repeat thanks.
[*]Matchmaking is woeful getting paired with teams and the same people over and over. It should have gotten better as I got higher, but it did not at all. 
[/list]
I like this game at its core, but it needs a lot more work and probably should have been delayed. Its got the potential for something special, but right now its not where it should be.

Rematch tries to be the next big thing in soccer games but it falls flat fast. It’s just not enjoyable, with constant performance issues and unreliable servers. Rematch: Почувствуй себя грушей для битья на фоне картонных трибун.

Rematch обещает захватывающий футбол на забитых стадионах. Но в реальности вас ждет цифровой концлагерь, где новичков планомерно уничтожают без всякой надежды на помощь. Забудьте о фейр-плей, этот "футбол" выплюнет вас, даже не вспомнив, как вас зовут.

Что такое Rematch на самом деле:

•  Безжалостная мясорубка: Обучение? Пфф, пережитки прошлого. В Rematch вас сразу бросают на растерзание к прокачанным "профи", которые даже не заметят вашего сопротивления.
•  Футбол без правил: Система подбора команд? Она существует только в теории. На практике вы будете играть против тех, кто в разы сильнее вас. Баланс? Не, не слышали.

Что остается после игры:

Rematch – это плевок в лицо всем, кто хоть немного любит футбол. Эта игра не приносит удовольствия, только боль, гнев и разочарование.

Забудьте про эту игру. Она не стоит ни вашего времени, ни ваших нервов.

Оценка: 1/10. Только за многообещающий баннер. Внутри – только цифровой ад.

Ich empfehle REMATCH, denn es macht sehr viel Spaß mit Freunden zu spielen und wenn man den Dreh raus hat, dann kommt man auch am Ball super klar! Dribbling ist super einfach und es gibt vielseitige Taktiken als Stürmer oder Verteidiger. Torwart zu sein ist auch cool, aber manchmal springt man mit egal welcher Technik nicht an dem Ball. Wenn der Ball z.B. unten recht platziert ist und man mit einem Hechtsprung versucht, da ranzukommen, dann schaffe ich das manchmal nicht. Vielleicht bin ich auch einfach schlecht.
Was ich super finde, sind auch zum Beispiel die Anpassungsmöglichkeiten. Da kann man seinen Fußballspieler super gut anpassen. Was nur irgendwann komisch wirkt, sind die Torjubel, die man in einem Spiel manchmal mehrmals sieht und irgendwie finde ich, dass sie ein wenig lame rüberkommen. Aber ich kann kaum beschreiben warum. Ich glaube, weil die Jubel extrem schnell ausgeführt werden, sehen die Animationen nicht immmer super natürlich aus.
ABER: Alles in einem ist REMATCH wirklich ein ultra spaßiges Spiel und ein Kauf lohnt sich wohl, wobei der Preis gerne noch tiefer sein könnte bei solch einem Spiel.

Свою нишу игра займет в истории киберспорта конечно, но не всё так однозначно.
- Очень плохой нет-код, а именно жесткий рассинхрон, который создаёт впечатление что ты попал в гендзюцу.
- Корявые хитбоксы мяча и игроков не позволяющие сделать точнейший отбор, а в совокупности с рассинхроном вы будете пролетать сквозь мяч и игрока, потому что почему бы и нет.
- Ошибаться в защите и на воротах категорически запрещено, в отличии от игры в нападении. В нападении можно моментально реанимировать промах благодаря коротким анимациям ударов, в защите же восстановление после попытки отбора или прыжка за вратаря занимает +- как две анимации удара под ряд за нападающего, то есть пока ты ошибешься в отборе, восстановишься и побежишь опять защищаться нападающий может совершить 2-3 действия. Тоже самое касается вратаря - самопасы от стенок естественно это проверка на реакцию, но не дай бог ты прыгнешь - это 100% гол, т.к. нападающий ударит гораздо быстрее чем ты вернешься на позицию после прыжка.
- Ужасный баланс. Я понимаю игра на ранних стадия и не имеет большого количества игроков чтобы забалансить идельно, но разница 3-4 звания - это слишком. На Алмазе тебе может попасться сильвер в команду, который играет 2 часа от силы.
- Редкий выпуск патчей.
- Нет фиксов багованых приёмов типа слайдов, фантомных анимаций и так далее. Ну серьезно, если вы даже и не будете их фиксить, то сделайте так, что бы можно было бы хотя бы этому противостоять.

Короче говоря в целом игра-то фановая, но на свой ценник имеет слишком очевидные проблемы, которые разрабы не особо-то спешат исправить.
Пока не починят неткод - очень больно играть.

Rematch montre clairement un certain potentiel, avec des idées intéressantes et un gameplay qui pourrait devenir très fun à long terme. Malheureusement, en l’état actuel, le jeu donne l’impression d’être une bêta déguisée en version finale.
De nombreux bugs viennent gâcher l’expérience : contrôles du ballon incohérents, déconnexions fréquentes, impossibilité de contrôler son joueur pendant que la partie continue… Ces problèmes nuisent fortement au plaisir de jeu et donnent une sensation de produit non finalisé.
Ce qui est encore plus surprenant, c’est le prix : 25 euros pour un jeu qui adopte une structure proche d’un free-to-play, avec une finition loin d’être au rendez-vous, c’est franchement audacieux. À ce stade, j’aurais attendu une version en accès anticipé à un tarif plus raisonnable, ou au minimum une meilleure stabilité.
Je garde un œil dessus, car le concept est bon. Mais pour l’instant, je ne peux pas recommander cet achat sans de sérieuses améliorations.

Played ~150 hours. Gotta be honest here…

I don’t know, guys… something just feels off. For me — and a bunch of others — it kinda feels like we got baited into buying early access in disguise. It’s like the devs pushed the game out the door earlier than planned, either to grab some quick cash or because investors were breathing down their necks.

Either way, what we got is a half-baked product.
Buggy as hell, the netcode is all over the place, matchmaking is a mess — and that’s just scratching the surface.

This ain’t worth 25€. Hell, in its current state, I wouldn’t pay even 10€.
Maybe in a year, with polished mechanics and most of the bugs ironed out, I could see myself dropping 25€ for it. But right now? Nah.

Not trying to trash the devs here — just keeping it real. I hope this serves more as constructive feedback than hate. You’ve got something promising, but it needs serious work.

this game is fun, it really is but to me there feels like there are more negatives than positive.
PRO: -gameplay is addicting and it feels more like youre playing futbol vs FC or pro evo on how the game feels n how it plays. love how satisfying it is to shoot a goal or to steal the ball from a player or just dribbling the ball around until I pass it into the goal.
-Customization is good, could be more variety n have us complete freedom on what colors to wear but solid noneoftheless and i do like that you can just buy everything for free basically if you grind enough
-battle pass is fairly easy to finish n I like it that way despite how others seem to feel about it
-despite only the more interesting maps being behind BP, they are pretty cool
CON:
-Dsync is a big issue rn and maybe its just me but after their recent patch, it feels like its become a bit more prominent. i dont find myself getting kicked out of servers often but it does feel like it gets close enough to that point
-There are a lot of glitches/exploits that people are finding and its making the games(not just ranked) very boring and the fact that we might not get it resolved until like a month or two later might have cause issue for those who want to continue to play the game
-Ball priority is weird, ik extra effort gives you a bit more priority but there are some moments where the ball will either TP to the opponents feet/hands or it will just go through the keeper.
-No player report system(doesnt really matter much to me but its weird they dont have one)
-Rank system is a mess. which at first i thought it was just the usual ranked shenanigans but then i read from their blogpost that it was an intended thing. wym i have the possibility to play with little jimmy who just bought rematch and we are going against elites?? in what world does that make sense? how is that fair in any way because no people(and you know for a fact there are ppl who do this so lets not pretend) paying to get boosted into elite. getting carried to master/elite. it baffles me to think that i can solo Q and potentially run into a bunch of premade teams of diamonds or higher in low rank
-no crossplay until september, bit of a bummer. dont know why you would release a pvp game in 2025 with no crossplay but ig shareholders are hungry or whatever reason they had to release the game a month early

TLDR: Game is fun especially if you got friends to play with(as long as they have it on the same platform) annoying to solo Q but still can be fun at times. game feels like its 1/3rd of being complete so i would wait on tryharding this game if you have it or want to get it, maybe hold on until some of the stuff gets fixed or it just happen to go on sale(assuming it will last long enough for either to happen). i wouldve been fine if they delayed the game for a month or two b4 releasing because now the community is getting a bit testy and some really want the best for this game

A game determined by randomness more than D&D. Every interaction where another player is involved is like rolling a dice. Once three players are involved, it's like chucking the dice of the tallest building in the world and playing fetch, the person to be the first finding it, can kick the ball.

Matchmaking is a bigger joke than the USA health system. Don't think I have to add to this.

Half of the time, multiple players see a different game practically, where one sees the keeper do an amazing save and one sees the keeper randomly jump when the attacker hasn't even shot yet. (I say half, because oftentimes it's the keeper telling himself he did an amazing save and it bugged, but we're not talking about these cases.)

The game is based on a cool concept, but is nowhere close to being out of early access and now makes me believe more than ever that this is just a cash grab. (Yet I will probably still play more, because otherwise I cannot play with my friends whom do enjoy the ♥♥♥♥♥♥ game.)

Rematch is like Rocket League meets FIFA Street—a high-energy 5v5 soccer game where real people replace the cars, and individual skill and teamwork take the spotlight. The gameplay is fluid, responsive, and packed with mechanics like dribbling, passing, and trick shots that reward creativity and coordination. It's deeply satisfying to learn and master.

Yet, Rematch stumbles in a few key areas: network stability is shaky, the lack of player reporting tools makes toxic behavior go unchecked (at launch), and there's little in the way of casual modes to ease the ranked grind. More tricks and a bit more polish would elevate it further.

Rematch is an exciting, skill-based twist on competitive soccer games with huge potential, but it needs better infrastructure and content variety to fully shine.

Le jeu est plein de potentiel, mais malheureusement il aurait jamais dû sortir aussi vite. 

Entre les problèmes de lancement du jeu qui provoque des blues screens, tous les bugs IG dans la jouabilité et les touches de balles c'est juste horrible il y'en a une multitude de micros-bugs / bugs bien cassent couilles, dernièrement j'ai même le jeu qui arrêtait pas de se mettre en screen full black toutes les 5sec. Ma config a aucun problème ( j'ai une machine de guerre ) mais le jeu est développé a la pisse. C'est bien dommage, car dans le fond le jeu en lui même est une super idée. Les serveurs puent la merde aussi, vous êtes 3/4 du temps sur des serveurs avec 45/50 MS et le signal réseau en jaune et ce même en ayant la fibre chez vous. 

Ne parlons même pas des mecs en classé qui ne savent pas toucher une balle, à se demander comment ils grind les ranks.. ca joue pas en équipe, dès que ca rate une action ca trashtalk, ca marque CSC. Et rarement on tombe avec des gars qui jouent en équipe qui ont compris le principe du jeu et qui savent toucher le ballon.

Si vous voulez un vrai avis, n'achetez pas ce jeu dans l'état actuel dans lequel il est. Les dev ont lachés un communiqué stipulant qu'ils leur faudraient des mois pour insérer le crossplatform ( il avait été annoncé a la sortie du jeu initial ) et régler toute une série de bugs mdr. Ca reflète bien la fainéantise française du studio, au vu de tout le fric qu'ils ont générés à la sortie du jeu et avec leur boutique de merde ils pourraient au minimum agrandir leur studio et leur équipe pour faire avancer les choses. Mais nan ca préfère se dorer les fesses avec l'argent de ceux qui leur ont permis de se faire un nom. C'est pitoyable, honte à eux.

Update: As of recent updates and by playing more of the game, I just can't recommend this game anymore. It is a fun arcade game when it works, and when it does work it is 100% a recommended game. Unfortunately you will be 50% going against the other team and other 50% against the game. The lag has become lag input and if you are unlucky enough the game will just lock your input, forcing you to always go either left or right on a walk speed, unable to leave the game or do anything. It is most likely something that I can fix on my side by tweaking the settings, I noticed going to the preset low and leaving fullscreen will barely make it noticeable. But this is a paid game. I should be able to buy it and unless I change the default settings, it should work. I have friends that crash when enter the game and this game is just giving more issues than it is worth it. I'll still come back to it from time to time, see if I can fix the lag input on my side. But until the game is in a state where I don't have to fight against lag input of seconds and I can actually just play a match without worrying about issues, I cannot recommended. Still leaving my original review because some of the points still stand, imo.

[h1] Pros [/h1]

The gameplay is a lot of fun. The controls are easy to understand and require some experimenting and practice to get used to. In that journey you will make stupid mistakes and will most likely give the ball to the adversary so many times. (Or that was only me...)
You can feel yourself getting better at the game. Better at placing the ball where others will be, know which pass to use, know when to hold onto the ball or when just say "♥♥♥♥ it" and leave the net open and go and grab that stray ball. (easier to do in 3v3).
The customization options are great, one or two things are missing like setting different colors for accessories depending if you are away or home, but besides that everything is pretty accessible. Is easy to farm for something you want and is not like it will give you some sort of advantage ingame, still pretty cool.

[hr][/hr]
[h1] Cons [/h1]

I'll just say it outright. Most of the community sucks. You will find people that don't care and will shoot towards the net every chance they get, no matter if it didn't work the past 7 times. Or teammates that will be unable to pass the ball and think they are the next jesus of Football. The network issues got a lot better with the recent patch, but there is still room for improvement.
Ranked matchmaking is a joke. There is only 5v5 and is a utter mess. To a person like me that thinks of this as a arcade chill game and prefer 3v3 or 4v4, ranked match is just awful.
There isn't a keybind to mute voice chat, so if you do find one guy that decided to play mid thanksgiving dinner with the entire family in the background, you either go AFK to turn off the voice chat or you suck up all the pans and utensils and shouting (probably in a foreign language).

[hr][/hr]

TLDR: REMATCH is a great arcade game. If you ever feel like you just want to play a bit and just looking for something quick and easy to play, this game is a great option. If you are looking for the next intense and fast action competitive game, I cannot recommend it.

Даже учитывая очень классную идею для футбола, бесконечные возможности, не рекомендую эту игру к покупке даже с возможным потенциалом:
1)Нет репортов, тиммейты если капризные бьют в свои ворота их не кикает. 
2)В прологе нам показывает, что надо играть по умному, где то пасовать, где то идти самому играть в соло, когда тиммейты закрыты к пасу, но просят его и тд, в реальности это какой то ужас.  Это вытекает из первого пункта. Стоит дурак на воротах, который нонстопом бьет от ворот до ворот, даже написать ему, попросить чтобы он остановился в игре нельзя, есть вроде войс но это несущественно, когда им никто не пользуется. А потом когда этот вратарь начинает играть в поле он тупо не пасует играет в соло, даже если он не Месси, а хуже Кривоногого соседа по двору, который ни разу не играл в футбол. А когда ты ему не даешь пас, он резко обижается и превращается в челика см пункт 1.
3) Эту игру делали либо думая, что все люди идеальны, которые будут за взаимопомощь и командную игру, либо идиоты, которые забыли сделать систему поощрения тимплею и баны для придурков.
4) БАГИ. В игру стабильно заливают донатный контент и нет кроссплатформы и фикса багов, ну позор. В той же рокет лиге, банит блин идиотов и тех кто сваливает и подставляет команды, не идеально но хоть есть для ВИДИМОСТИ, чтобы адекватные игроки понимали куда сгружать гнев от попадания с обезьянами. А тут чата нет, 4 команды которые никак не отображают нормального взаимодействия. Посмотрите систему у игры SMITE команд огромное количество и всем на всех языках понятно, ну неужели сложно сделать 20 текстовых комбинаций, помимо ФУТБОЛОЧКИ МОРСКОЙ за денюжку?
5) Рейтинг просили кроме 5vs5 ну тут то сложно что-ли?

PS. И что-то мне подсказывает что надо сделать режим 1 на 1 чтобы отсеять идиотов, которые пришли сюда просто по мячу подубасить а не играть в настоящий футбол в виде командной игры.
PPS. Игра хорошая в целом, но ее реальность зависит от людей, а люди без рамок превращаются в злобное тупое стадо, которое друг друга готово перегрызти и испоганить всем окружащим и себе за одно.

At its best, this game can be incredibly fun and rewarding - tricky, realistic-ish indoors football that rewards teamplay and proper positioning, but also individual skill. There is no other game like it on the market that I know of, and it reminds me of the good ol' Fifa Street games, albeit with the caveat of controlling a single player on the field, rather than the whole team.

In its current state however, I can't bring myself to recommend it. 
The game has for the most part become very unenjoyable, in large part due to certain "tech" and the players who spam them constantly because they're piss easy to do. It will not be enjoyable until the devs fix all these EXPLOITS (let's call them what they are) related to double sprint/extra effort like blade shots, ippy slides, golden/rainbow boost and whatever other garbage. Completely detracts from the gameplay experience, and destroys the otherwise enjoyable football feel and look that the game has, with people teleporting to and volleying a ball they lobbed themselves, or teleporting the ball back to them after pushing it away, or zooming around at Mach 10 with the ball in control.  

If they want to cater to that type of "tech" player, that's cool, and I wish them success, but I will not play anymore.

This is not helped by the netcode and associated "rollbacks" which can be very iffy and sometimes doesn't feel too great even in your own region, or the rare (but incredibly gamebreaking) glitch where you simply can't control the ball the entire match... 

I can only hope they iron out these issues sooner than later, because at its core this game is amazing. But alas.

I dislike most sports media (Being active IRL is more stimulating than playing/watching a sport for me) but this game scratches that competitive and social area of my brain so well!

Been playing since the beta if that matters. Prior to this most recent update, Sloclap has showed continued support and minor fixes throughout the life of the game. It has been fun to see improvements requested by me and other players get implemented near-instantly (in videogames that's about a week for me...devs usually patch issues months after the angry mobs disperse) Most of the problems the beta had were caused by the poor netcode they had when crossplay was enabled, so I see why getting crossplay is taking so long.

Sifu was a single-player game. This is new territory for Sloclap and yet they are still providing a great online arena for us. The biggest draw to rematch for me was the co-op street soccer "fighting game" concept I had in my head when I saw the concept trailer for this some time ago. 

"The people who made Sifu are making a soccer game?" 

"Oh damn it's a soccer fighting game!"

I was sold. then there were bugs. Then the bugs got fixed. So, what's wrong with this game? Not much besides the community. I Don't know about blue lock and i play Lacrosse IRL so I'm not a soccer/football fan. So when I play rematch, I play with my team to fight our opponents through stamina mgmt and good passing. There are a lot of whiners and main characters in sports. If anyone has issues with this game they probably need to pass more or play something a little more complex than madden or FIFA.

Depois toquei a bola para nosso goleiro que foi incapaz de pegar uma bola nas mãos dele e aumentou a toxicidade. A partir dai comuniquei que não iria jogar com jogadores tóxicos e trolls. Todos ficaram spamando o " well played " que todos já conhecemos, perdemos e fechei o jogo com 0 vontade de jogar por um bom tempo. Jogou mal lançou e já é mais tóxico que a comunidade do lol, parabéns a todos.

Сломанный неткод, рассинхрон, сломанные сервера - всё это было в предыдущем их онлайн проекте и осталось здесь же. Они буквально ничего не сделали, чтобы не допустить подобного. Это была главная причина почему ABSOLVER умер.  Что там, что здесь - проблема не исправляется, но зато мы имеем кучу доната, новые скинчики, косметичка)))
 Я очень надеюсь, что по итогу они исправят проблемы, но если нет - GG

Absolute banger. Certified classic. 10/10
Clear need of patches aside (considering the studio's size vs the ambition of the game) it's an outstanding display of understanding what makes a game fun. Not that it's unexpected from the developers of Sifu, but nonetheless, incredible execution on an idea that honestly to me is Fifa Street from the PSP back from my childhood with the competitive spirit of Rocket League that I have lost in the past years.

Cannot stress enough, addictive, fun, and most importantly, fun.

[h1]So, it just doesn't work.[/h1] 
[h2] The servers are quite bad [/h2]
Constant disconnections, 50/50 chance that your action is read or it even connects, you, the ball, and everyone elses phases through each other or simply rollback.

[h2]Gameplay[/h2] 
No matchmaking and no incentive, points-wise, to play as a team, defend, or even build from the back. If you have low ping and some skill you will be able to just plant yourself in the opposition box and wait. Too little to do for the price. Only real competition is in 5v5 ranked, and it's in that mode that the server seems to suffer the most.

[h2]No real updates[/h2]
The updates are few and far between, almost adding nothing. Most of the time the patch notes just sound like "trust me bro it works" and in reality it doesn't. For a game that was in [u]development for 4 years [/u], it still feels like a beta.

[h2]Monetization[/h2] 
You pay for the game, seasonal pass and skins. It really feels like a free experience behind a paywall.

In sum. It has bad servers, almost no support, limited gameplay,  but if you like hoarding skins don't worry they just keep adding them. Almost forgot that doesn't work either, having games with both teams wearing the same colors.

Стань звездой мирового футбола и покажи класс - забивай ударом скорпиона, исполняй бицепсный байсикл и поражай ворота фирменными "пушками" в девятку! Обводи соперников финтами Зидана, прокатывай мимо защитников на радуге Неймара, и разрывай сети соперников ударами с лета!

Покажи всем, кто здесь главный: развивай своего игрока, практикуй новые стили игры, получай буст в скорости, точности и реакции. С каждым матчем ты все ближе к вершине - стань кумиром трибун и страхом для вратарей!

Будь не просто на спорте - будь на уровне чемпионов!

[list][b]Понравилось:[/b]
[*]+ Наличие достижений
[*]+ Локализация на несколько языков, в том числе и на русский
[*]+ Поддержка геймпада
[*]+ Яркий визуальный стиль
[*]+ Поддержка кастомизации игрока/формы/поля
[*]+ Разнообразие анимаций пасов, голевых передач и взаимодействий с мячом
[*]+ Поддержка голосового чата

[b]Спорно:[/b]
[*]* Подключение случайных игроков в середине матча (в случае отключения одного из персонажей)
[*]* Клавиша “Выход из игры” находится в подменю “Система”
[*]* Вкладка “Настройки”, является вкладкой кастомизации персонажа, а не “внутриигровыми настройками”
[*]* Токсичное сообщество и игроки

[*]- Отсутствие поддержки кросс-платформенной игры[/list]

[b]Вывод:[/b]
“[b]REMATCH[/b]” - это околоспортивный аркадный симулятор футбола от студии [b]Sloclap[/b], в котором игроки берут под свой контроль восходящих звезд спорта. Не просто безымянных человечков в шортах, а будущих легенд - тех, кто через пот, жесткие стыки и сумасшедшие подкрутки идет к мировой славе. Участвуйте в динамичных матчах 3х3, 4х4 и 5х5, постепенно поднимая свой рейтинг в глобальной таблице - будь то игра за атакующего форварда, надежного защитника или настоящего вратаря-стены, вытаскивающего безнадежные мячи.

Разработчики делают ставку на разнообразие и инклюзивность. Настройка внешности позволяет создать действительно уникального спортсмена - с любым телосложением, стилем, и вне зависимости от инвалидности, пола, или сексуальной идентичности. Здесь каждый может выйти на поле и стать частью матча. Ведь футбол - это, прежде всего, командная игра, а не шоу для избранных.

Геймплей построен вокруг классической идеи: пять минут на матч, два состава, одна цель - забить как можно больше голов. Все происходит от третьего лица, с полным контролем над игроком. Но это не «симулятор [b]FIFA[/b]». Это уличный футбол на стероидах, где правила - скорее направление, чем рамки. Тут не просто пасуешь и бьешь - тут вертишь “рулеты”, бьешь “ножницами”, прокидываешь мяч в стиле “эластико”, а затем забиваешь под перекладину с подкруткой, уводя мяч от вратаря на последнем касании. Каждый удар - как хук в боксерском ринге, каждый гол - как взрыв фейерверка на стадионе.

При этом “[b]REMATCH[/b]” предлагает широкую свободу действий: удары с воздуха, резкие развороты, ложные финты, импровизация на месте. Мяч ведет себя живо, и часто именно траектория - ключ к успеху. Соперники могут быть быстрее, но ты можешь быть хитрее, отправив мяч по такой дуге, от которой у вратаря останутся только вопросы.

Не хочется бегать в нападении? Тогда займитесь обороной или встаньте на ворота. Благодаря гибкой системе смены ролей, любой игрок может взять на себя функции вратаря и стать настоящим кошмаром для соперников, вытаскивая “мертвые” мячи в прыжке или блокируя удары в упор. Главное - вовремя встать на позицию и не оплошать, ведь тут один пропущенный гол может решить весь матч.

Однако игра, несмотря на бодрый темп и многообещающую концепцию, пока далека от идеала. Игроки по всему миру сталкиваются с рядом ощутимых проблем, прежде всего - с нестабильным сетевым кодом. Иногда мяч и игроки начинают телепортироваться по полю, как будто это не футбольное поле, а портал в иное измерение. Это делает нормальную игру почти невозможной: пас не доходит, тайминг сбит, удары становятся непредсказуемыми, а итог - фрустрация.

Еще один больной вопрос - сообщество игроков. Здесь хватает токсичных пользователей, которые активно используют голосовой чат не по назначению, отвлекают, грубят, или, что хуже всего, намеренно портят матч. Кто-то забивает автоголы, кто-то отбирает мяч у своей команды, игнорирует тактику и пасы. Это не просто раздражает - это убивает весь соревновательный дух.

Кастомизация - один из сильных элементов проекта. Игра предлагает множество вариантов для создания персонажа: пол, телосложение, прически, косметика, аксессуары - все, чтобы собрать уникальный образ. Можно сделать “второе я” или нарядить игрока так, чтобы он запоминался с первого взгляда. Победные анимации, фирменные позы после голов - все на месте. Причем все это работает как визуальный инструмент, чтобы выделиться на поле - особенно когда в команде каждый выглядит как индивидуальность, а не клон в одинаковой форме.

Можно настроить форму отдельно для домашних и выездных матчей. Однако и здесь не обошлось без странностей. При старте игры Вы не видите, в какой форме будет команда соперников. В результате на поле нередко оказываются две команды в почти одинаковых цветах. Разглядеть отличия в разгаре быстрого темпа - задача не из простых, особенно когда у Вас доля секунды на передачу или удар. Все это легко может привести к роковым ошибкам.

Но настоящая проблема кастомизации - это не интерфейс, а поведение игроков. Некоторые намеренно создают максимально странных, гротескных или откровенно провокационных персонажей. И когда эти игроки еще и ведут себя неподобающим образом в матче, игнорируют команду, или пытаются “тащить в одиночку”, - возникает закономерное отторжение. Все, что ты хочешь - выйти из матча и забыть, что вообще запускал игру.

У игры есть потенциал. В “[b]REMATCH[/b]” действительно весело играть, особенно с друзьями или слаженной случайной командой. Тут есть динамика, есть эмоции, есть азарт. Каждый гол здесь ощущается, как победа любимой сборной на чемпионате мира. Но, к сожалению, вместо того чтобы исправлять явные и давно известные баги, разработчики сосредоточились на коллаборациях с брендами и спортивными знаменитостями. Это не удивительно - деньги решают все. А игроки, уже купившие игру за 1400 рублей, как говорится, «сделали свой вклад». Уйдут они или нет - разработчикам, судя по всему, не так уж и важно.

Такое отношение заметно: оценки в [b]Steam[/b] постепенно падают, пиковый онлайн неуклонно снижается. Из 90 тысяч игроков на старте, осталось около 6–10 тысяч. И этот тренд, судя по всему, продолжится.

В итоге: “[b]REMATCH[/b]” - это не [b]CS2[/b] и не [b]Valorant[/b]. Это не спортивный симулятор в духе [b]FIFA[/b] или [b]PES[/b]. Это нечто свое, местами кривое, местами вдохновляющее. У нее есть шанс стать отличной игрой, даже для тех, кто далек от футбола. В нее хочется врываться вечером после работы и кричать “пас!” друзьям в наушниках. Но пока она балансирует между веселой аркадой и наполовину работающим сетевым экспериментом. Хочется верить, что ее не добьет жадность издателей, и мы не увидим надпись “[b]удалено из Steam[/b]” раньше времени.

Well, I had already played a few hours on Xbox, but I bought it on Steam to play with friends since there's no crossplay.

Anyway, here are some points that really disappointed me in this game:

1 - The gameplay is extremely tiring — always the same moves. For someone looking for a casual experience, it's very exhausting.
2 - The game's connection works in "stages", it's not fluid, and that can become extremely annoying.
3 - Your character simply has no physics; unless you press a button, you have no collision at all with the ball — everything only works if you press a button beforehand.
4 - The solo experience is really bad. The voice chat has no moderation whatsoever — free hate and racism.
5 - The "high" price for what is basically an open beta.

What makes me sad is that the idea of a more arcade-style football game is very exciting, but the studio’s execution leaves much to be desired. Unfortunately, the planned scope couldn’t be achieved with the available budget/staff.

I was really hyped for this game, but its execution is disappointing. Maybe it has long-term potential, but for now, it's just a dream that fell short.

It's football/ soccer. 

If you like that, you'll probably like this. 

Has occasional issues now that feel like they will be fixed in the future. But also, they feel like they shouldn't be issues at all in a game that is fully published and $30. 

These issues have to do with client vs server issues. Such as, catching the ball as the goal keeper, walking with it... and then the replay showing it passing through the goal keeper and slowly rolling in. 

A much more common issue is appearing to make a successful tackle or stop of the ball and controlling the ball... and then the server adjusting what is on your client to show actually the ball is now behind you. 

Over all fun. The issues they could fix in the future. But for $30 and micro-transactions, full releasing this game with these very frustrating issues feels odd... but they are infrequent enough that I still recommend the game.

I initially made a first review at around 100 hours into the game and it was a bad review. I now have an additional 100 hours into game, and while the game has improved since the last time i played it, I still cannot recommend this game. I improved my skills and was able to reach the highest rank in the game(elite) but I just literally found out that the matches i'm getting i'm getting paired with MUCH lower ranks half of the time. its a team game, so when you have to use your teammates to make plays against the opposing team who actually are good, its literally impossible and i'm pretty much losing every time. I'm not insane at the game but I am pretty good at it and it makes no sense I reached this high only to still get low ranked players. No hate to them not knowing how to play, but I do. On top of that, updates are slow and things still need to be improved. I don't recommend this game still and lowkey it may even die before they know exactly what they want. Great mechanics but poorly executed.

The bugs and servers still have a lot of work before this game can be fun to play.. You would think 5 months after the game released the bugs would be fixed. I'm not talking about bugs that turn into "mechanics" (ippy slide, golden dash, etc.) because that's what makes the game fun. I'm talking about bugs where the ball goes through you while you're playing keeper, and people teleporting and glitching through you because the servers suck. Instead of fixing these things, Sloclap decides to add in more cosmetic items that you buy with real money. You can unlock a lot of items in the season pass (which you buy with real money), but there's even a bug that doesn't let you get the items from that. Anytime I try to get the items I unlocked in the pass it says "An error has occurred while buying a pass tier. Try again". This company is trying to go the money grab route rather than to make a great game.... and the bugs that they can't fix don't even allow them to do that. 

I've complained about the bugs plenty of times before, but I would still recommend people to play it. Now with the season pass bug, I can't recommend it anymore. If you're going to develop the game to get peoples money, at least do THAT right. It's a shame, this game could have really taken off, but the dev's just don't care.

Ну, это какой-то ужас... Она и вначале была не очень в плане сетевого кода, но сейчас стало ещё хуже. Мяч просто может залипнуть на земле — и всё. Иногда он телепортируется в произвольный и совсем не желанный для тебя момент. Сейчас ты бежишь с мячом? А нет, тебе показалось — он у врага. Хотя знаешь? Всё же у тебя!

И так постоянно! Я думал, в Project Zomboid сетевой код ужасный, а тут игра дала понять, что она будет на первом месте по уровню «ужаса». Это мультиплеерная сессионная игра, а нет возможности кинуть репорт долбаёбу, который просто портит тебе игру. Просто берёт и забивает себе голы. Вратари выбегают и не хотят защищать ворота. Как можно играть в такой шлак — не понимаю... И ЭТО ЕЩЁ В РЕЙТИНГОВОМ РЕЖИМЕ!

В обычном лобби так вообще происходит полный ад. Однозначно не рекомендую сейчас брать — продукт говняный и сырой. Когда допилят и сделают хотя бы возможность репортить — тогда можно будет играть. Потенциал у игры есть, и он огромный, но пока что разработчики просто ушли в запой и ничего делать не хотят.
